title: stenophyllus collinus
intro: Stenophyllus collinus, also known as Wood's rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help soothe and calm various health issues. The health benefits of Stenophyllus collinus include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and acting as an antacid, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion, tea, or tincture for its medicinal benefits, and its leaves and flowers can also be used to make a salve or ointment for topical application.
